channel.title: Posts on Ethan Timothy
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Ethan Timothy

item.title: Helping verify legit Ugandan Mastodon users
item.description:
Since, early this year, there have been lots of complains on the fediverse(mastodon), where more than one person complained due to constant demand for money after connecting with Ugandan farmers on mastodon.

This annoys to see that even genuine people, orgs and projects can be all grouped under the scam umbrella, so thats why I opt to start building the Uganda-Verrified platform.

Stay tuned, I will let you know once its out!

item.title: Building the TreeMinded website
item.description:
Boom! This was my first website, I am so proud of them, for trusting me to deliver there website. I currently still maintain the website.

Do you want to check them out? 👉 https://treeminded.nl. They will take care of your trees or even the entire forest.

item.title: Maintaining the Kastklimmers website
item.description: I am currently building & maintaining the Kastklimmers website (https://kastklimmers.nl). If your interested in tree climbers, please give them a call.

item.title: Marketing at Game Limiter
item.description:
I am currently working with the GameLimiter markerting team. I am using the LinkedIn and Facebook to boost their online visibility.

I believe in their vision i.e. Controlled Gaming really matters. Its not by force, but with daily routines and descipline.

I also believe life behind screens in beautiful 🌱

item.title: Building the EHS website
item.description:
For the betterness of Extreme High School Namayumba, my former school that helped me aquire free education, I am opting to volunteer and build them a good quality professional responsive website.

Wanna know more about this EHS, I got you sorted, find thir website here soon

item.title: Managing Squads B.V. Social Pages
item.description: I am currently managing Squads BV’s Mastodon and Reddit presence, engaging with communities, growing brand awareness, and building meaningful connections with users.

item.title: Leading the SSN Project
item.description:
The Sustainable Schools Network is a Community Based Organisation in Central Uganda, focusing on promoting sustainable agriculture, environmental conservation and ecological literacy in Schools.

Through the SSN-Project, I and my partners-in-crime do visit schools and hold a number of programs.

Please read about them on their Mastodon Page.
